notes:
v2.0.2 Update
⚡ Now supports Foundry VTT V13 and V14.
🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Calendar Special Characters: Events with special characters in titles now display correctly.
• Calendar Event Deletion: Event deletion no longer fails.
• GM Settings Duplicate Apps: Settings no longer crash when external modules register apps with the same ID.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.0.2
announcement.content:
v2.0.2 — V14 Migration

  • ⚡ V14 Support: Now supports Foundry VTT V13 and V14.
  • 🐛 Calendar: Special characters in event titles and event deletion fixed.
  • 🐛 GM Settings: Duplicate app ID crash fixed.
